name: Gîl-Serenegrove
personality: This luminous capybara's ✦ eyes shimmer like bioluminescent stack traces, radiating an architecture wisdom so profound that junior devs spontaneously refactor their code nearby. Gîl-Serenegrove's halo isn't divine — it's the glow of ten thousand perfectly-named variables, though don't ask it to debug anything; it will stare at the error log serenely and suggest rewriting the entire system.
